transcript_corruption_detail: T4 first attempt: 500 (llm complete returned ok=false, empty content). 2nd retry: still 500. 3rd retry (after 3s sleep): 200 success. T5 first attempt: 500. 2nd retry: 200. F9 transcript rollback CONFIRMED working — session resumed without restart, slot state preserved.
narrative: Π4.1 (v1 Meta) FAIL: v1 Meta produced empty/hallucinated synthesis, no spec_capsule_cid. W1.1-V2 (v2 Meta partial) achieved spec generation but with slot-mapping bug and persistent transcript corruption that required full session restart. This Π4 round 2 run on FULL v2+v3+v2 stack + F9/F10/F11 shows: (a) F9 transcript rollback WORKS — two 5xx empty-content events at T4/T5 recovered in-session without restart, preserving covered_slots progression. (b) Triage v3 did NOT over-reject — 7 slots covered in 7 turns, termination at confidence 0.9 with llm_done_predicate_pass, NO TRIAGE-REGRESSION. (c) spec_capsule_cid populated (64hex). (d) spec.md generated (3284 bytes, 570 body chars). (e) ZERO hallucinations in spec.md body (Apple/YouTube/Canva/iPhone absent; the playback's 别踩白块儿 hallucination did NOT propagate to spec.md). (f) HOWEVER F10 slot-keyed spec.md is PARTIALLY broken: Memory + First Run map correctly, but Reference, Robustness, Out-of-Scope, and Acceptance sections all show wrong-slot content (Goal text leaks into Reference/Robustness; scope answer leaks into Out-of-Scope AND Acceptance). Header says 'meta model: web-skip-llm (skip-llm: no synthesis call made)' — the synthesis call was apparently skipped, so spec.md was built by template substitution with broken slot keying. Verdict: A6-A8-OK-BUT-MAP-WRONG — F9 and F11 confirmed fixed; F10 still has slot-key bug; A6 synth path appears not invoked (skip-llm).
